column1: # Neovim dependency inventory.
# Format: name|executable|required|source|install_hint|used_by
# required: yes/no. source: mason/homebrew/npm/pnpm/go/curl/external/plugin.
Go language server|gopls|no|go|go install golang.org/x/tools/gopls@latest|nvim/lsp/gopls.lua
SQL language server|sqls|no|go|go install github.com/sqls-server/sqls@latest|nvim/lsp/sqls.lua
Dockerfile language server|docker-langserver|no|mason/npm|Mason dockerfile-language-server or pnpm add -g dockerfile-language-server-nodejs|nvim/lsp/dockerls.lua
TypeScript native preview|tsgo|yes|pnpm|pnpm install -g @typescript/native-preview|nvim/lsp/tsgo.lua
dprint|dprint|no|homebrew|brew install dprint|nvim/lsp/dprint.lua,nvim/plugin/conform.lua
ty Python language server|ty|no|curl|Use the installer documented at https://astral.sh/ty|nvim/lsp/ty.lua
Ruff Python formatter|ruff|no|mason/homebrew|Mason ruff or brew install ruff|nvim/plugin/conform.lua
Lua language server|lua-language-server|yes|homebrew|brew install lua-language-server|nvim/lsp/lua_ls.lua
JSON language server|vscode-json-language-server|yes|mason/npm|Mason json-lsp or pnpm add -g vscode-langservers-extracted|nvim/lsp/jsonls.lua
ESLint language server|vscode-eslint-language-server|yes|mason/npm|Mason eslint-lsp or pnpm add -g vscode-langservers-extracted|nvim/lsp/eslint.lua
CSS language server|vscode-css-language-server|yes|mason/npm|Mason css-lsp or pnpm add -g vscode-langservers-extracted|nvim/lsp/cssls.lua
HTML language server|vscode-html-language-server|yes|mason/npm|Mason html-lsp or pnpm add -g vscode-langservers-extracted|nvim/lsp/html.lua
Bash language server|bash-language-server|no|npm|pnpm add -g bash-language-server|nvim/lsp/bashls.lua
YAML language server|yaml-language-server|yes|mason/npm|Mason yaml-language-server or pnpm add -g yaml-language-server|nvim/lsp/yamlls.lua

AWS CloudFormation language server|cfn-lsp-server-standalone.js|no|external|Download the standalone bundle from https://github.com/aws-cloudformation/cloudformation-languageserver/releases and place cfn-lsp-server-standalone.js under ~/.local/share/cfn-lsp/ or set CFN_LSP_SERVER|nvim/lsp/cfn_lsp.lua
CloudFormation linter|cfn-lint|no|homebrew/pipx|brew install cfn-lint or pipx install cfn-lint|nvim/README.md fallback validation
AWS SAM CLI|sam|no|homebrew|brew install aws-sam-cli|nvim/README.md SAM fallback validation
Marksman Markdown language server|marksman|no|mason/homebrew|brew install marksman or Mason marksman|nvim/lsp/marksman.lua
Stylelint language server|stylelint-lsp|no|npm|npm install -g stylelint-lsp|nvim/lsp/stylelint_lsp.lua
Prettier|prettier|yes|mason/npm|Mason prettier or pnpm add -g prettier|nvim/plugin/conform.lua
StyLua|stylua|yes|homebrew|brew install stylua|nvim/plugin/conform.lua,nvim/stylua.toml
shfmt|shfmt|no|homebrew|brew install shfmt|nvim/plugin/conform.lua
ShellCheck|shellcheck|no|homebrew|brew install shellcheck|nvim/lsp/bashls.lua
